## ShipmentTracker — Blazor Web App

**Architecture choices matching your requirements:**

| Requirement | Solution |
|---|---|
| Fast first load, then snappy | **Auto render mode** (InteractiveAuto) — SSR on first visit via Server, then WebAssembly takes over |
| Worldwide users / latency | WebAssembly runs locally after download — no server round-trips for interactions |
| Every page interactive | `@rendermode InteractiveAuto` on all pages |
| Individual accounts auth | ASP.NET Core Identity with full account scaffolding |

**Key pages:**
- `/track` — Public shipment lookup by tracking number (no login required)
- `/shipments` — Dispatcher dashboard (CRUD, filter by status/destination)
- `/my-shipments` — Customer view (card-based, shows estimated delivery)

**Run with:** `cd ShipmentTracker/ShipmentTracker && dotnet run`
